mode_a_pixel.description: Chibi pixel art used for overworld sprites, sprite sheets, and top-down maps.

line_weight_and_style.outline_color_rule: Near-black (#1A1A1A) or darker shade of fill color. Pure black (#000000) used only on hair/darkest areas. Never colored outlines.

proportions.style: Chibi — oversized head, small body, stubby limbs
proportions.head_shape: Rounded with flat top, hair adds significant volume

shading.approach: Flat fill with one shadow tone per material. No gradients. Minimal dithering.
shading.shadow_placement: Right side and bottom of forms, under chin, under hair bangs
shading.highlight_placement: Top-left of hair (white/light pixel clusters for sheen)

sprite_sheet_specs.cell_approximate_size: 306x195 px per cell (rendered at high res, actual sprite ~48x64 logical)
sprite_sheet_specs.directions: Down, Left, Right, Up (top to bottom row pairs)

npc_sprite_specs.dimensions: 1536x1024 px (single large sprite on white background)

map_specs.void_treatment: Pure black (#000000) surrounds the playable area — represents the unmanifested world
map_specs.detail_level: High — individual furniture items, appliances, plants, decorative objects all clearly rendered
map_specs.color_temperature: Warm interior (amber/honey wood tones) contrasted against cold black void

mode_b_illustration.description: MP100-inspired illustration style used for conversation portraits, CGs, and backgrounds. Characterized by intentionally simple character designs with thin, loose linework.

line_weight_and_style.outline_width_px: 1.5-2.5 (variable — thinner on facial features, slightly thicker on body/clothing contours)
line_weight_and_style.quality: Slightly loose and hand-drawn. Lines have subtle variation in weight — not perfectly uniform vector strokes. Occasional tapering at endpoints.
line_weight_and_style.facial_lines: Very minimal. Nose is a single short line or subtle shadow. Mouth is a small simple shape. Eyebrows are thin quick strokes.
line_weight_and_style.clothing_lines: Slightly heavier than facial lines. Wrinkle lines are sparse — only at major fold points (elbow crease, collar, shoulder seam).
line_weight_and_style.hair_lines: Dynamic, flowing strokes that taper. Individual strand groups visible. Slightly messy/natural.

proportions.build: Slim, natural. Not muscular or exaggerated. Dad is slightly broader-shouldered than Rikizo.
proportions.head_shape: Rounded with slight chin point. Rikizo and Dad have angular jawlines. Mom has softer/rounder face.
proportions.neck: Visible, normal length. Shadow under chin is a consistent style marker.
proportions.shoulders: Natural width, slightly simplified (no detailed musculature)
proportions.hands: Simplified — visible when posed (Rikizo's hand in pocket) but not highly detailed

register_calm_nichijou.eyes: Small to medium size. Simple oval/almond shapes with dark pupil fill. Dad has the smallest/most dot-like eyes. Rikizo slightly larger. Mom has the most detailed eyes with subtle eyelashes.
register_calm_nichijou.nose: Minimal — a short vertical line or soft shadow. Placed center-low on face. Very understated.
register_calm_nichijou.mouth: Small. Neutral = small closed line. Smile = slight upward curve. Rikizo's open smile shows a hint of red/teeth. All very simple.
register_calm_nichijou.eyebrows: Thin, expressive. Dark brown. Short curved strokes above eyes.
register_calm_nichijou.expression_range: Calm, warm, approachable. Subtle emotions — gentle smiles, mild expressions.

register_intense_kakusei.note: No intense-register references exist yet. When generating 覚醒 assets: eyes go large and detailed, mouths open wide, speed lines and dramatic shadows appear. See Art Direction Bible for MP100 dual-register rules.

shading.approach: Predominantly flat color with one shadow tone per surface area. Minimal — only at neck/chin, major fabric folds, and hair underside.
shading.light_source: Upper-left (~10 o'clock), consistent with pixel mode
shading.shadow_style: Soft-edged but clearly defined zones, not gradients. The boundary between lit and shadow areas is slightly soft, not cel-shaded hard.
shading.highlight_approach: No explicit highlights on skin. Hair has very subtle lighter areas suggesting sheen. Clothing has no highlights.
shading.shadow_color_rule: Shadow tone is a warmer, darker version of the base color (not grey overlay). Neck shadows are distinctly warm brown.

portrait_specs.framing: Bust-up — head to mid-torso/waist. Character centered horizontally, head in upper third.
portrait_specs.background: Pure white (#FFFFFF) or near-white. No background elements in calm-register portraits.
portrait_specs.character_fill: Character occupies approximately 60-70% of canvas width
portrait_specs.crop_bottom: Soft fade/vignette to white at bottom edge (most visible on mom-convo.png). No hard crop line.

conversation_background_specs.style: Semi-realistic painted illustration. MORE detailed than character portraits (MP100 hallmark — backgrounds richer than characters).
conversation_background_specs.color_temperature: Warm — amber lighting, honey wood tones, soft shadows
conversation_background_specs.detail_level: Individual objects clearly rendered (appliances, dishes, fruit bowl, notes on fridge). Lived-in, authentic Japanese home feel.
conversation_background_specs.perspective: One-point or two-point perspective, eye-level or slightly above

cg_scene_specs.note: family.png (684x945) shows a framed family photo — a CG/illustration piece showing all three family members together with Mt. Fuji and cherry blossoms background.
cg_scene_specs.style: Slightly more detailed than conversation portraits — more defined eyes, more expression detail. Characters match portrait designs but with added rendering.
cg_scene_specs.use_case: In-game collectible photos, event CGs, memory scenes

rikizo.hair: Dark brown (#2A2018), short and slightly messy/spiky, swept to sides. Not long, not buzzcut. Natural teenage boy hair.
rikizo.eyes: Dark brown/black, medium size, friendly expression
rikizo.glasses: Thick rectangular dark frames (#1A1A1A), noticeably substantial but not oversized. Clear lenses — eyes visible through them. Frames sit properly on nose with temples behind ears. Key character identifier alongside red tie.
rikizo.face: Young (high school age), slight angular jaw, clean-shaven, light skin, wears thick rectangular glasses
rikizo.clothing_school: Navy blazer (#2B3A5C), white dress shirt (open collar, no top button), red striped tie (#A03030 with #3A4A6A stripes), gold buttons
rikizo.pixel_glasses: 2-3px dark rectangular frames visible on face in all directions (front, side, back). Consistent across all animation frames.
rikizo.pixel_clothing: Dark navy blazer, white shirt with dark tie visible at collar, dark slacks
rikizo.identifying_marks: Thick rectangular dark-framed glasses + red striped tie are the two strongest identifiers across both modes. Pocket dictionary (noted in character bible, not yet visible in current references).

dad.hair: Dark brown/near-black (#2A2018), messy and spiky, slightly longer than Rikizo. More wild/unkempt.
dad.eyes: Small, dark, dot-like. The most minimal eyes of the three characters. Relaxed/easygoing expression.
dad.face: Adult male, broader jaw than Rikizo, slight stubble shadow at neck, calm expression
dad.clothing: Grey hoodie (#9A9A9A, open/unzipped) over navy blue t-shirt (#2B3A5C). Casual, at-home look.
dad.pixel_clothing: Grey jacket/hoodie over blue top, dark navy pants
dad.identifying_marks: Grey hoodie is the strongest identifier. Hair is messier/wilder than Rikizo.

mom.hair: Dark brown (#3D2B1F), shoulder-length bob/wavy, soft and feminine. Shorter than Rikizo or Dad's hair overall but more volume.
mom.eyes: Slightly more detailed than Dad/Rikizo — subtle eyelashes, warmer expression. Still simple in MP100 style but with a feminine touch.
mom.face: Adult woman, softer/rounder face shape than the males, gentle smile, warm expression
mom.clothing: Beige/cream knit cardigan (#D8CCA8) over light blue floral blouse (#A8B8D0 with small white flower pattern). Domestic, warm, motherly.
mom.pixel_clothing: Cream/beige top with light-colored blouse, brown skirt
mom.identifying_marks: Cream cardigan + blue floral blouse is the strongest identifier. Shoulder-length wavy hair distinguishes from male characters.

cross_mode_consistency.color_mapping: Characters use the same color palette across pixel and vector modes. Dad's grey hoodie is grey in both. Rikizo's navy blazer is the same navy. Mom's cream cardigan matches.
cross_mode_consistency.hair_style_mapping: Hair silhouettes match across modes. Dad = messy/spiky. Rikizo = shorter/neater spiky. Mom = shoulder bob.
cross_mode_consistency.proportion_shift: Pixel mode uses ~2.5 head chibi proportions. Vector mode uses ~4-5 head semi-realistic proportions. The jump is expected and natural.
cross_mode_consistency.skin_tone_shift: Pixel skin (#E8B87C) is slightly more saturated/warm than vector skin (#F2D8B8). This is intentional — pixel art reads better with higher saturation.

global_rules.light_source: Upper-left, approximately 10 o'clock. Consistent across ALL assets, both modes.
global_rules.japanese_text_accuracy: Any visible Japanese text must be verified for correctness before inclusion.
global_rules.seasonal_default: Spring (cherry blossoms, mild tones) based on family.png reference
global_rules.void_representation: Pure black (#000000). The void is the absence of manifested reality — no texture, no gradient, just black.
